policy: Every public OpenAPI operation requires certification evidence before promotion.

endpoints.purpose: Evaluate caller-supplied, source-owned Core evidence for the first high-cash opportunity signal family.
endpoints.when_to_use: Use as the RFC-0002 Slice 10 API foundation for deterministic high-cash evaluation when the caller already has source-authorized evidence references and cash weight.
endpoints.when_not_to_use: Do not use as a live source-ingestion API, data-product certification proof, Gateway contract, Workbench product proof, or supported-feature promotion.
error_examples: 403 returns product-safe Problem Details when the caller lacks advisor role or idea.signal.evaluate capability.
400 returns product-safe Problem Details when portfolioStateRef, holdingsRef, cashMovementRef, or cashflowProjectionRef sourceSystem/productId does not match the governed Core source contract.
400 returns product-safe Problem Details when request validation fails.
endpoints.openapi_evidence: scripts/openapi_quality_gate.py validates summary, description, tag, responses, and examples.

endpoints.purpose: Fetch source-owned Core high-cash evidence through the configured Core source adapter and evaluate deterministic high-cash candidate posture.
endpoints.when_to_use: Use as the bounded RFC-0002 Slice 5 source-fetching API foundation when the caller is entitled to the requested portfolio scope and Core query/query-control-plane runtime URLs are configured.
endpoints.when_not_to_use: Do not use as live source certification, source-worker certification, durable candidate persistence, data-product certification proof, Gateway contract, Workbench product proof, or supported-feature promotion.
error_examples: 403 returns product-safe Problem Details when the caller lacks advisor role, idea.signal.evaluate capability, or portfolio entitlement.
503 returns product-safe Problem Details when Core source runtime configuration is missing or invalid.
400 returns product-safe Problem Details when request validation fails.
endpoints.openapi_evidence: scripts/openapi_quality_gate.py validates summary, description, tag, responses, and examples.

endpoints.when_not_to_use: Do not use as a live upstream source-ingestion API, allocation-drift calculation, mandate compliance approval, suitability approval, rebalance action, order instruction, data-product certification proof, Gateway contract, Workbench product proof, client-ready publication, or supported-feature promotion.

400 returns product-safe Problem Details when actionRegisterRef, mandatePerformanceHealthRef, or mandateRiskHealthRef sourceSystem/productId does not match the governed Manage, Performance, or Risk source contract.

endpoints.purpose: Evaluate caller-supplied, source-owned Core evidence for the first high-cash opportunity signal family and persist created candidates through the internal idempotency and audit repository foundation.
endpoints.when_to_use: Use as the RFC-0002 Slice 06 and Slice 10 API foundation when an internal caller already has source-authorized evidence references, source-reported cash weight, an Idempotency-Key, and candidate persistence capability.
endpoints.when_not_to_use: Do not use as a live source-ingestion API, data-product certification proof, Gateway contract, Workbench product proof, or supported-feature promotion. PostgreSQL persistence, replay, and source-ingestion recovery proof applies only when the PostgreSQL repository adapter is configured and does not certify production storage, live Core source-worker readiness, or supported product readiness.
error_examples: 403 returns product-safe Problem Details when the caller lacks idea.candidate.persist capability.
403 returns product-safe Problem Details in production-like profiles when privileged X-Caller-* headers lack trusted caller-context provenance.
409 returns product-safe Problem Details when the idempotency key was already used with a different request payload.
400 returns product-safe Problem Details when request validation fails or Idempotency-Key is absent or blank.
endpoints.openapi_evidence: scripts/openapi_quality_gate.py validates summary, description, tag, responses, and examples.

endpoints.purpose: Record an internal governed lifecycle transition for a persisted idea candidate through the lifecycle history, idempotency, and audit foundation without accepting downstream-authority lifecycle targets as caller input.
endpoints.when_to_use: Use as the RFC-0002 Slice 06 and Slice 10 API foundation when an internal caller has a persisted candidate, the idea.candidate.lifecycle.transition capability, an Idempotency-Key, and needs to move the candidate through the canonical caller-settable lifecycle graph before review or conversion workflows.
endpoints.when_not_to_use: Do not use as durable database persistence proof, downstream proposal authority, downstream acceptance authority, manage-review authority, report authority, suitability approval, execution authority, client-communication authority, Gateway contract, Workbench product proof, or supported-feature promotion. Request input intentionally excludes accepted and executed; downstream posture belongs to conversion outcomes and downstream submissions.
error_examples: 403 returns product-safe Problem Details when the caller lacks idea.candidate.lifecycle.transition capability.
404 returns product-safe Problem Details when the candidate is not found.
409 returns product-safe Problem Details for idempotency conflict or invalid lifecycle transition.
400 returns product-safe Problem Details when targetLifecycleStatus is accepted, executed, or otherwise outside the caller-settable lifecycle vocabulary.
400 returns product-safe Problem Details when request validation fails or Idempotency-Key is absent or blank.
endpoints.openapi_evidence: scripts/openapi_quality_gate.py validates summary, description, tag, responses, and examples.

endpoints.purpose: Return a source-safe internal detail projection for a persisted idea candidate, including redacted source evidence, lifecycle history, review, feedback, conversion, report-evidence, audit summary posture, and caller entitlement-scope enforcement when scope headers are present.
endpoints.when_to_use: Use as the RFC-0002 Slice 10 and Slice 11 API foundation when an internal caller has idea.candidate.detail.read capability or an advisor/operator role, is within any provided caller entitlement scope, and needs a source-safe evidence-drawer projection for an existing candidate.
endpoints.when_not_to_use: Read-only Gateway publication exists through lotus-gateway GET /api/v1/ideas/candidates/{candidate_id}, including entitlement-scope header forwarding. Durable PostgreSQL providers use repository-side candidate-detail projection for ordinary detail reads. Do not use as Workbench product proof, data-product certification proof, source-system route disclosure, raw evidence export, downstream authority, client-ready publication, or supported-feature promotion.
request_examples: GET /api/v1/idea-candidates/idea_high_cash_8d57adbf52f7f5a7 with X-Caller-Capabilities: idea.candidate.detail.read and X-Caller-Portfolio-Ids: PB_SG_GLOBAL_BAL_001
error_examples: 403 returns product-safe Problem Details when the caller lacks idea.candidate.detail.read capability or an allowed advisor/operator role, or when caller entitlement-scope headers do not match the persisted candidate scope.
404 returns product-safe Problem Details when the candidate is not found.
400 returns product-safe Problem Details when candidateId is blank or caller entitlement-scope headers contain blank values.
endpoints.openapi_evidence: scripts/openapi_quality_gate.py validates summary, description, tag, responses, and examples.

endpoints.purpose: Replay the persisted evidence hash posture for an internal idea candidate against caller-supplied current source refs without exposing raw source routes or payloads.
endpoints.when_to_use: Use as the RFC-0002 Slice 06, Slice 10, and Slice 15 API foundation when an internal operator has idea.candidate.evidence.replay capability and needs product-safe matched, stale-source, hash-mismatch, expired, or missing-candidate replay posture for an existing persisted candidate.
endpoints.when_not_to_use: Do not use as live Core source-ingestion proof, data-product certification proof, downstream workflow execution proof, source-system route disclosure, raw evidence export, Gateway contract, Workbench product proof, durable production recovery certification, client-ready publication, or supported-feature promotion.
error_examples: 403 returns product-safe Problem Details when the caller lacks the operator role or idea.candidate.evidence.replay capability.
404 returns product-safe Problem Details when the candidate is not found for evidence replay.
400 returns product-safe Problem Details when currentSourceRefs is empty or request validation fails.
endpoints.openapi_evidence: scripts/openapi_quality_gate.py validates summary, description, tag, responses, and examples.

endpoints.purpose: Evaluate a deterministic fallback or, only in local/test, an explicitly unattested workflow fixture against a persisted idea candidate with governed workflow-pack identity, redaction, source-claim verification, forbidden-action blocking, source-safe idempotent lineage recording, and bounded operation telemetry.
endpoints.when_to_use: Use as the RFC-0002 Slice 09 and Slice 10 API foundation when an internal caller has a persisted candidate, idea.ai-explanation.evaluate capability, an Idempotency-Key, and needs deterministic fallback. Local/test may also use the governed lotus-ai:idea-explanation:v1 / v1 / lotus-ai:governed-verifier:v1 fixture contract; production-like profiles require verified Lotus AI run attestation and currently reject workflow output.
endpoints.when_not_to_use: Do not use as lotus-ai runtime proof, AI provider execution proof, autonomous advice, suitability approval, downstream authority, Gateway contract, Workbench product proof, data-product certification proof, client-ready publication, or supported-feature promotion. Use the separate AI lineage store proof artifact for source-safe persistence evidence.

409 returns product-safe Problem Details when rationale or meeting-preparation drafting is requested before ready evidence and review-ready lifecycle, when an AI request id is replayed with changed lineage, or when Idempotency-Key is reused for a different request fingerprint.

400 returns product-safe Problem Details when request validation fails, Idempotency-Key is absent or blank, metadata is outside the versioned provider-safe allowlist, workflow output is invalid, workflowPackId/workflowPackVersion/evaluationRef is not governed, or production-like workflow output lacks verified Lotus AI provenance.
400 ai_execution_provenance_required is returned before candidate lookup or lineage persistence for self-asserted workflow output in demo, staging, or production.
400 invalid_ai_workflow_pack is returned before candidate lookup or lineage persistence and does not echo caller-supplied workflow text, candidate-sensitive details, prompts, or provider output.

Repo-owned model-risk dashboard and alert artifacts are certified by the AI model-risk operations proof gate; this endpoint reports that posture but does not promote product support by itself. AI lineage store and model-risk operations proofs are consumed by aggregate implementation-proof readiness, not promoted by this endpoint alone.

endpoints.purpose: Record an internal advisor review action for a persisted idea candidate through the review workflow foundation.
endpoints.when_to_use: Use as the RFC-0002 Slice 08 and Slice 10 API foundation when an internal caller has a persisted candidate, trusted caller entitlement scope headers covering the candidate, idea.review.record capability, advisor role, request authorizedScope within those trusted entitlements, and Idempotency-Key.
endpoints.when_not_to_use: Review governance evaluates persisted candidate scope and idea-candidate-state-v1. reviewId is a durable resource identity independent of Idempotency-Key: equivalent content under a new key replays, changed content returns review_identity_conflict, and PostgreSQL claims identity before candidate/audit/outbox mutation. Contradictory persisted snapshots are quarantined. Do not use as suitability, compliance, mandate, execution, client-communication, Gateway, Workbench, or supported-feature promotion.
error_examples: 403 returns product-safe Problem Details when the caller lacks idea.review.record capability, a supported review role, trusted caller entitlement headers covering the persisted candidate scope, or an authorizedScope claim within trusted caller entitlements.
404 returns product-safe Problem Details when the candidate is not found.
409 returns product-safe Problem Details with idempotency_conflict, review_identity_conflict, review_action_conflict, or candidate_state_conflict for the corresponding governed conflict.
400 returns product-safe Problem Details when request validation fails or Idempotency-Key is absent or blank.

Equivalent content under a new key replays; changed content returns review_identity_conflict; PostgreSQL prevents duplicate feedback/audit/outbox writes. Do not use as model-training, data-product, Gateway, Workbench, or supported-feature promotion.

endpoints.purpose: Return a source-safe runtime trust telemetry preview for the proposed IdeaCandidate data product using aggregate active-repository state only.
endpoints.when_to_use: Use for internal platform/operator validation when a caller has idea.mesh.trust-telemetry.preview.read capability and needs aggregate candidate, source-authority, freshness, supportability, lifecycle, workflow, and blocker posture before platform mesh certification.
endpoints.when_not_to_use: Do not use as data-product certification proof, platform source-manifest inclusion proof, Gateway or Workbench discovery proof, candidate detail, source route export, raw evidence export, business product discovery, client-ready publication, or supported-feature promotion.
request_examples: GET /api/v1/data-mesh/trust-telemetry/runtime-preview?generatedAtUtc=2026-06-21T10:10:00Z with X-Caller-Roles: operator and X-Caller-Capabilities: idea.mesh.trust-telemetry.preview.read
error_examples: 403 returns product-safe Problem Details when the caller lacks the operator role or idea.mesh.trust-telemetry.preview.read capability.
400 returns product-safe Problem Details when generatedAtUtc is present but not timezone-aware.
endpoints.openapi_evidence: scripts/openapi_quality_gate.py validates summary, description, tag, responses, and examples.

endpoints.when_not_to_use: Do not use as data-product certification proof, platform source-manifest inclusion proof, Gateway or Workbench discovery proof, candidate detail, source route export, raw evidence export, business product discovery, client-ready publication, or supported-feature promotion.

endpoints.purpose: Return source-safe downstream realization readiness across Advise, Manage, Report, Render, and Archive blockers plus manifest-backed planned downstream contract readiness for internal operators.
endpoints.when_to_use: Use for internal platform/operator validation when a caller has idea.downstream-realization.readiness.read capability and needs to see lotus-idea-owned conversion intent, conversion outcome, report evidence-pack request, and planned Advise/Manage/Report handoff contract posture before downstream product proof.
endpoints.when_not_to_use: Do not use as Advise suitability proof, Manage action-register/rebalance authority proof, Gateway contract, Workbench product proof, data-product certification proof, client-ready publication, or supported-feature promotion. Bounded route and materialization proof refs clear only their named blockers.
request_examples: GET /api/v1/downstream-realization/readiness with X-Caller-Roles: operator and X-Caller-Capabilities: idea.downstream-realization.readiness.read
error_examples: 403 returns product-safe Problem Details when the caller lacks the operator role or idea.downstream-realization.readiness.read capability.
endpoints.openapi_evidence: scripts/openapi_quality_gate.py validates summary, description, tag, responses, and examples.

endpoints.purpose: Return an aggregate, source-safe RFC-0002 implementation proof readiness snapshot for internal operators.
endpoints.when_to_use: Use for internal platform/operator validation when a caller has idea.implementation-proof.readiness.read capability and needs to see aggregate proof blockers across source ingestion, review queue, AI explanation, data mesh, runtime trust telemetry preview/snapshot evidence, outbox delivery, non-AI operator workflow operations, Workbench realization, downstream realization, and supported-feature promotion.
endpoints.when_not_to_use: Do not use as live implementation proof, certified live broker runtime proof, downstream delivery proof, data-product certification proof, platform source-manifest inclusion proof, Gateway contract, Workbench product proof, business product discovery, client-ready publication, or supported-feature promotion.
request_examples: GET /api/v1/implementation-proof/readiness?evaluatedAtUtc=2026-06-21T10:10:00Z with X-Caller-Roles: operator and X-Caller-Capabilities: idea.implementation-proof.readiness.read
error_examples: 403 returns product-safe Problem Details when the caller lacks the operator role or idea.implementation-proof.readiness.read capability.
400 returns product-safe Problem Details when evaluatedAtUtc is absent, invalid, or not timezone-aware.
503 returns product-safe Problem Details when implementation proof readiness source contracts cannot be read.
endpoints.openapi_evidence: scripts/openapi_quality_gate.py validates summary, description, tag, responses, and examples.

endpoints.purpose: Report lightweight service health for diagnostics and platform smoke checks.
endpoints.when_to_use: Use for simple service health probes and local diagnostics.
endpoints.when_not_to_use: Do not use as a readiness or dependency-quality signal.
error_examples: Unhandled service errors return product-safe Problem Details.
endpoints.openapi_evidence: scripts/openapi_quality_gate.py validates summary, description, tag, responses, and examples.

endpoints.purpose: Preview or apply a tenant-scoped legal hold, hold release, erasure, or purge while preserving regulated tombstones, delivery fences, and immutable operation audit.
endpoints.when_to_use: Use only through an authorized privacy or records workflow carrying idea.data-lifecycle.manage, exact tenant entitlement, a governed authority decision, Idempotency-Key, and required dual approval.
endpoints.when_not_to_use: Do not use Lotus Idea to self-authorize legal, privacy, Archive, Report, or AI-provider decisions; do not use this route for portfolio accounting, official performance, risk, suitability, compliance determination, execution, report rendering, client publication, Gateway/Workbench publication, or supported-feature promotion.
request_examples: Headers: Idempotency-Key, X-Caller-Subject, X-Caller-Roles=privacy_officer|records_manager, X-Caller-Capabilities=idea.data-lifecycle.manage, X-Caller-Tenant-Ids, and trusted caller-context provenance in production profiles.
error_examples: 400 invalid_request for malformed action metadata or Idempotency-Key.
403 permission_denied for missing role, idea.data-lifecycle.manage, trusted provenance, or exact tenant entitlement.
404 data_lifecycle_candidate_not_found without cross-tenant existence disclosure.
400 archive_lifecycle_posture_invalid for malformed, stale, mismatched, or cryptographically invalid Archive evidence.
409 data_lifecycle_action_blocked for hold, active delivery, retention, approval, authority, policy, or state prerequisites.
409 data_lifecycle_idempotency_conflict when an Idempotency-Key is reused with changed content.
409 archive_lifecycle_posture_replay_conflict when an applied Archive decision or digest is reused under another operation key.
503 durable or lifecycle repository unavailable; no process-local mutation fallback is permitted.
503 archive_lifecycle_trust_unavailable when the governed Archive trust bundle cannot be loaded.
endpoints.openapi_evidence: scripts/openapi_quality_gate.py validates operation identity, summary, description, Operations tag, source-safe success example, and complete 400/403/404/409/503 Problem Details metadata, including Archive trust, validation, and replay errors. Live bank authority and production Archive trust/store proof remain blockers.

endpoints.purpose: Report whether the service process is live.
endpoints.when_to_use: Use for liveness probes that should only prove the process is running.
endpoints.when_not_to_use: Do not use to decide whether the service is ready for traffic.
error_examples: Unhandled service errors return product-safe Problem Details.
endpoints.openapi_evidence: scripts/openapi_quality_gate.py validates summary, description, tag, responses, and examples.

endpoints.purpose: Report whether the service is ready to receive traffic.
endpoints.when_to_use: Use for readiness probes and deployment routing decisions.
endpoints.when_not_to_use: Do not use as a business capability or upstream data-quality signal.
error_examples: 503 readiness response returns {"status":"draining"} during intentional drain.
endpoints.openapi_evidence: scripts/openapi_quality_gate.py validates summary, description, tag, responses, and examples.
